title: polystichum lineare
intro: Polystichum lineare, also known as the Japanese fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polystichum lineare include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestive health. The herbal preparation of this plant involves drying and processing the leaves to be used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
